title: Airtable error due to unknown field name
symptom: When executing the 'Create a record' node in Airtable, an error occurs stating 'Unknown field name: "message"'. This prevents the record from being created.
applies_when: Creating a record with specific fields
not_this_if: The error does not mention unknown field names
Using a different node or service
root_cause: The error occurs because the JSON data being sent to Airtable includes a field name that does not exist in the specified table schema. This can happen if the field name is misspelled or if it has not been created in Airtable.
fix_steps: Check the field names in your Airtable table schema
Ensure that all field names in your JSON match exactly with those in Airtable
Remove or correct any unknown field names in your request
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the field names in your Airtable node's JSON data to match the table schema.
